memoryArtifacts.headline: Biography
memoryArtifacts.description:
Biography
The Stawells were early settlers in Somerset after the Conquest, taking their name from a village in the middle of the county on the Glastonbury estates, and acquiring lands at Cothelstone, …

zh.St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothel: 英國薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同聖 多馬 本 康特波也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Stowell於1370年出生在英國薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同時，他的父親Sir Matthew Stawell30歲，母親Elinor Merton20歲。他於大約1403年與Joan Frampton在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1439年2月14日在他的家鄉享年69歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同聖 多馬 本 康特波也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Stowell于1370年出生在英国薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同时，他的父亲Sir Matthew Stawell30岁，母亲Elinor Merton20岁。他于大约1403年与Joan Frampton在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1439年2月14日在他的家乡享年69岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同聖 多馬 本 康特波也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Stowell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Stowell (Somerset), Stowell (Gloucestershire), East and West Stowell in Wilcot (Wiltshire), or Stawell (Somerset), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’. The surname was taken to the Isle of Man by 1511, from whence it migrated to Lancashire and Yorkshire.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Stowell was born in 1370, in Cothelstone, Somerset, England, his father, Sir Matthew Stawell, was 30 and his mother, Elinor Merton, was 20. He married Joan Frampton about 1403, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 14 February 1439, in his hometown, at the age of 69, and was buried in St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, England.

fr.St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothel: St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Stowell est né en 1370, à Cothelstone, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Matthew Stawell, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elinor Merton, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Joan Frampton environ 1403, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 février 1439, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothel: St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Stowell 1370 in Cothelstone, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Matthew Stawell 30 und seine Mutter Elinor Merton 20. Er hat um 1403 in Somerset, England Joan Frampton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Februar 1439 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Stowell è nato il nel 1370 nel Cothelstone, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Sir Matthew Stawell, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elinor Merton, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Joan Frampton circa 1403, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 febbraio 1439, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Stowellが1370年にイギリスソメルセトコスエルストーンで生まれた時，父Sir Matthew Stawellは30歳，母Elinor Mertonは20歳であった。約1403年にイギリスソメルセトでJoan Framptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1439年2月14日に故郷で69歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトコスエルストーンスト ソマス オフ カンテルブリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothel: 영국 서머세트 컷헬스톤 스트 톰아스 프 캉르버이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Stowell(이)가 1370년 영국 서머세트 컷헬스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Matthew Stawell(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elinor Merton(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1403년 영국 서머세트에서 Joan Frampton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1439년 2월 14일 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 컷헬스톤 스트 톰아스 프 캉르버이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothel: St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Stowell nasceu em 1370, em Cothelstone, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Matthew Stawell, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elinor Merton, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Frampton aproximadamente 1403, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1439, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothel: ст томас оф кантирбури'с чурч, котелстоун, сомирсет, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Stowell родился в 1370 г. в местности котелстоун, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Matthew Stawell было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elinor Merton, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Frampton около 1403 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 14 февраля 1439 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности ст томас оф кантирбури'с чурч, котелстоун, сомирсет, Англия.

Se casó con Joan Frampton aproximadamente 1403, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1439, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, Inglaterra.
